description: The production BUDGET and LEDGER implementation may fail to preserve the snapshot-bound composite evidence contract proven by the A3 protocol spike.
mitigation: Implement budget.insights.evidence.get as governed by DD-INSIGHTS-COHERENT-PUBLIC-EVIDENCE: one immutable plan revision, one complete public LEDGER snapshot, one canonical BudgetPositionCalculator path, bounded dated members, shared binding provenance, and forced concurrent-correction conformance. Fail closed before private access, duplicate calculation, or partial output.
